Name: Project setup: clone repo & install
Description: Run npm install. Copy .env.example → .env.local. Point frontend to your API URL.

Name: Backend: MongoDB + run API
Description: Set MONGODB_URI in backend learn/.env. Run npm run backend. Check GET / returns OK.

Name: Auth: sign up & registration API wired
Description: signup page → backend register / OTP send. Student check: new user row in DB.

Name: Auth: verify OTP page
Description: verify-otp flow works; user marked verified; redirects toward profile-setup.

Name: Auth: profile setup after verify
Description: profile-setup saves name/photo; redirects to app (dashboard or home).

Name: Auth: login + JWT on requests
Description: Login stores token; protected pages call API with Authorization header (see socketAuth / api utils).

Name: Auth: forgot + reset password
Description: forgot-password → email/OTP → reset-password → can login again.

Name: App shell: navigation + routing
Description: All main routes load without error: home dashboard profile circles chat notifications.

Name: Dashboard: feed loads
Description: dashboard shows posts/suggestions from API; loading and empty states OK.

Name: Profile: own profile + edit
Description: profile page: view/edit; photo upload if implemented.

Name: Profile: other user profile
Description: profile/[id] loads; respects privacy if any.

Name: Circles: browse & open circle
Description: circles list + circle/[id] page: details posts events load.

Name: Circles: create join leave
Description: Create circle; join public; request private; leave — API + UI match.

Name: Posts: create edit delete in circle
Description: createPost flow; edit/delete own post; media if in scope.

Name: Posts: like & comment
Description: toggleLike + addComment from circle/post UI; counts update.

Name: Post detail page
Description: post/[id] shows full post; deep link from feed/chat works.

Name: Report post flow
Description: ReportPostModal submits to /posts/report; toast/error handling OK.

Name: Circle admin: manage page
Description: circle/[id]/manage: tabs work (requests members posts flagged reports…); mobile usable.

Name: Circle admin: moderation page
Description: moderation page loads; actions match backend rules.

Name: Notifications
Description: notifications page + bell: list unread; mark read; mobile opens full page not broken dropdown.

Name: Chat: rooms & messages
Description: chat page lists rooms; send text/media per app; errors handled.

Name: Realtime: Socket.IO auth
Description: Socket connects after login; tab/ref-count or presence behaves as designed.

Name: Events
Description: events page + circle events: list/create/reserve per your API.

Name: Admin panel (core)
Description: admin home; users list search; at least one moderation action tested end-to-end.

Name: Admin: content views
Description: admin posts / comments / circles / flagged / reports / analytics — open each; fix broken links.

Name: Errors & toasts
Description: API failures show user-friendly message (errorHandler / sanitize) not raw stack traces.

Name: Responsive pass
Description: Dashboard circle manage notifications: usable on phone width (scroll not trapped).

Name: Deploy or demo build
Description: Build passes (npm run build). Optional: deploy frontend + host backend; update env URLs.

Name: README: how to run
Description: Short steps: install env vars run backend run frontend — for supervisor/demo.
